page_metadata.biocontainers__summary: Software for inference of clonal genotypes using targeted single cell nucleus sequencing.
page_metadata.biotools__summary: A new statistical model and machine learning inference algorithm designed to determine the pattern of how DNA mutations are distributed in individual cells of a tumour. The software provides implementation of several probabilistic models for clustering single cell (nucleus) data and inferring clonal genotypes.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: A new statistical model and machine learning inference algorithm designed to determine the pattern of how DNA mutations are distributed in individual cells of a tumour. The software provides implementation of several probabilistic models for clustering single cell (nucleus) data and inferring clonal genotypes.
